responsibility: Provide a project-level catalog of all knowledge records. Enables deterministic lookup and filtering without requiring exhaustive artifact traversal. Acts as the entry point for knowledge queries.

write_policy.notes: New entries are appended when new knowledge records are created or superseded. The index never deletes entries; superseded records are marked with status=superseded.

index_id.description: Stable identifier for this index instance, e.g. 'KI-<project_short>-v1'.

entries.description: One entry per knowledge record, regardless of status.

items.knowledge_type: string (one of the values defined in knowledge_record.schema.json)
items.title: string
items.record_path: string (relative path to the knowledge_record file)

query_contract.description: The index supports the following deterministic query operations. All queries are exact-match or filter-based; no heuristic or fuzzy matching.

operations.name: filter_by_tag
operations.output: entries where tags array contains the tag

operations.name: filter_by_run_id
operations.output: entries where run_ids array contains the run_id

operations.name: get_history
operations.output: all versions of the record (including superseded), ordered by version

_changelog.change: Initial version. Defines project-level knowledge catalog schema with deterministic query contract.
